propositions: Add a new authorship attestation kind rebar.authorship.v1 on the foundation asymmetric attest substrate providing sign/verify machinery and trust-root resolution.

register_authorship_policy idempotently pins POLICY[rebar.authorship.v1] to the sshsig scheme and is invoked at attest package import so verify selects scheme from source-pinned policy, not the envelope.
sign_authorship signs caller-supplied payload bytes under the identity principal, first calling sshsig.ensure_available so a missing/old ssh-keygen fails honestly rather than swallowing errors.

Trust root is always resolved from the identity entity's in-band keys via resolve_trust_root using allowed_signers_from_keys, never from the envelope, closing alg-confusion and trust-anchor smuggling.
verify_authorship returns a non-verified Verdict for unknown or keyless identities and rejects cross-identity or tampered envelopes, never raising.
This ticket delivers only the machinery; wiring signing into the write path and enforcement is deferred to a later leaf (3183).
